author: phase-4-coordinator
content: Resolved by generic refactor: all FFT functions (fft, ifft, fft2, ifft2, fftn, ifftn, rfft, irfft, rfft2, irfft2, rfftn, irfftn, hfft, ihfft) are now generic over a new FftFloat trait implemented for f32 and f64. Per-precision plan caches are lazily constructed, so using only f64 costs nothing for f32 (and vice-versa). Added f32 round-trip tests: fft_ifft_f32_roundtrip, fft_f32_impulse, fft2_f32_roundtrip, rfft_irfft_f32_roundtrip, rfft2_f32_roundtrip, fft_real_ifft_real_roundtrip_f32.
